case_title: CATHERINE SHINE et al VS. ARLENE TALMADGE et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,340.50 FILED BY SHINE, CATHERINE SHINE, WILLIAM B. AS TO DEFENDANT TALMADGE, ARLENE LITTLE RUNNING BEAR LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-22-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-22-2010 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-19-2010 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $15.00) SERVED SEP-22-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TALMADGE, ARLENE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-24-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-24-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT ARLENE VOLLAND ALSO APPEARS ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT JOSEPH TALMADGE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO LITTLE RUNNING BEAR LLC BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF FEB-24-2011 AT 8:30AM.
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO LITTLE RUNNING BEAR LLC BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF FEB-24-2011 AT 8:30AM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-24-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHINE, CATHERINE SHINE, WILLIAM B. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TALMADGE, ARLENE $6,340.50 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,430.50, DEFENDANT LITTLE RUNNING BEAR, LLC, IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
